value.0: Welcome to the bank, <lad/lass>. I am the Investment Broker. How may I help you?
Investments in the local economy can boost certain projects for a time and yield positive and negative results for the investors.
There are many different types of investments. Which would you care to learn more about?

Ingenuity investments have the greatest risk, but also the greatest earning potential. They have the capacity to triple or quadruple an investment, but the risk is so high, most investors stay away from this kind of investment.

Usually, you would be investing in an ingenius new invention, a new scientific process, or some kind of new magical study. The main problem with all new things is that they will either be hated or embraced by society.
Therefore, the investment risk of Ingenuity items is the highest, but possesses the greatest possibility for a high return... the highest, I might add.

Merchant investments are very risky, but the pay off can be quite large. Normally, local merchants use this option to raise money for a new addition to their stores, repairs or add ons for their shop, or bringing in new inventory.

The primary reason behind this is so they will not fall into debt with the bank. The amount of investment is usually medium, and the investment has about a 50% risk factor. Either the shop improvement works or it does not.
In rare cases, the shop makes record sales that you, as an investor, benefit from. In some cases, though, the shop may be forced to close out.

Market investments are used to build the local commercial economy. Normally, the investment is a large sum, but the pay off potential is good. Under rare circumstances, you could lose your investment.
According to the trends, Market investments are more reliable than Trade investments, but the pay off is not as high.
Trade investments give normal people the opportunity to finance trade ships and caravans abroad. The main drawback is that this investment requires a large payment.

There is a small chance that you will lose your entire investment, but there is a small chance your investment could make a large sum. Usually, the pay off for Trade investments are good, but the negative effects can be tremendous.
Food investments are made to boost the farming sector of the economy. There is a very small chance that your investment will pay off big, and there is a small chance that your investment will fumble.
Overall, Food investments are low-risk and usually pay off, but returns in this market are low.
Are you sure you wish to cancel your investment? There is a charge of 10% of your investment to cancel it early.
Very well. What type of investment would you like to make?
Very well. The risk involved in a Research project is <StartHighlight>[High]</Start> and requires an investment of 1,000 gold coins.
Very well. The risk involved in a local Merchant is <StartHighlight>[Medium]</Start> and requires an investment of 3,000 gold coins.
Very well. The risk involved in a Trade route is <StartHighlight>[Low to Medium]</Start> and requires an investment of 2,500 gold coins.
Very well. The risk involved in a Trade route is <StartHighlight>[Medium]</Start> and requires an investment of 5,000 gold coins.
Very well. The risk involved with Food production is <StartHighlight>[Low]</Start> and requires an investment of 100 gold coins.
Actually, I do not wish to invest at this time.
